description: Comprehensive mapping of ESM format requirements to test fixtures. This matrix ensures 100% requirement coverage and serves as the authoritative checklist for conformance testing.

SCHEMA.name: JSON Schema Validation
SCHEMA.description: Requirements for validating ESM files against the JSON Schema

STRUCT.name: Structural Validation
STRUCT.description: Mathematical and semantic consistency checks beyond schema validation

FORMAT.name: Format Specifications
FORMAT.description: Field requirements, value constraints, and format rules

ALGO.name: Algorithmic Requirements
ALGO.description: Specific algorithms for ODE derivation, stoichiometric matrices, etc.

VALID.name: Validation API
VALID.description: Validation function behavior and error handling requirements

EXPR.name: Expression Engine
EXPR.description: Expression AST manipulation and processing requirements

SCHEMA-02-01.description: Top-level ESM file must have required 'esm' version field

SCHEMA-02-02.description: Top-level ESM file must have required 'metadata' field

SCHEMA-02-03.description: At least one of 'models' or 'reaction_systems' must be present

SCHEMA-04-01.description: Expression AST must follow grammar: Expr := number | string | ExprNode

SCHEMA-04-02.description: ExprNode must have 'op' field and 'args' array

STRUCT-06-01.description: Number of ODE equations must match number of state variables for each model

STRUCT-07-01.description: Every species referenced in reactions must be declared in 'species' section

STRUCT-04-01.description: Scoped references must resolve to actual variables using dot notation

STRUCT-05-01.description: Variables in event affects must reference declared variables

STRUCT-05-02.description: discrete_parameters in events must match declared parameters

STRUCT-07-02.description: Reaction substrates and products must reference declared species

STRUCT-07-03.description: Reaction stoichiometries must be positive integers

STRUCT-07-04.description: No reaction can have both substrates: null and products: null

STRUCT-10-01.description: Coupling entries must reference existing models/reaction systems/data loaders/operators

STRUCT-10-02.description: operator_apply coupling entries must reference existing operators

BEHAV-LOAD-01.description: load() function MUST throw on malformed JSON

BEHAV-LOAD-02.description: load() function MUST throw on valid JSON that fails schema validation

BEHAV-LOAD-03.description: load() function MUST succeed for valid JSON that passes schema but fails structural validation

BEHAV-06-01.description: All models must be fully specified with all equations, variables, and parameters

BEHAV-07-01.description: ODE generation from reactions must use standard mass action kinetics

FORMAT-04-01.description: Built-in arithmetic operators must support specified arities

FORMAT-04-02.description: Calculus operators must include required additional fields

FORMAT-05-01.description: Continuous events must have conditions array and affects array

FORMAT-05-02.description: Discrete events must have trigger and affects fields

FORMAT-06-01.description: Model variables must have type field with valid values

FORMAT-07-01.description: Reaction must have id, substrates, products, and rate fields

ALGO-07-01.description: ODE generation algorithm: v = k · ∏ᵢ Sᵢ^nᵢ for mass action kinetics

ALGO-10-01.description: operator_compose algorithm for matching and combining equations

ALGO-10-02.description: Placeholder expansion: _var matches every state variable in target system

VALID-API-01.description: validate() function must return ValidationResult with specified fields

VALID-API-02.description: ValidationResult must contain schema_errors, structural_errors, unit_warnings, is_valid

VALID-ERR-01.description: SchemaError must include path, message, and keyword fields

VALID-ERR-02.description: StructuralError must include path, code, message, and details fields

VALID-CODES-01.description: Structural error codes must match specified standard codes

DISPLAY-CHEM-01.description: Chemical species names must render with proper subscripts using element-aware tokenizer

DISPLAY-CHEM-02.description: Element lookup must recognize all 118 chemical element symbols

DISPLAY-NUM-01.description: Number formatting rules for integers, decimals, and scientific notation

DISPLAY-OP-01.description: Operator precedence rules must minimize unnecessary parentheses

DISPLAY-UNICODE-01.description: Unicode display format specifications for derivatives, multiplication, etc.

DISPLAY-LATEX-01.description: LaTeX display format specifications for fractions, derivatives, species names

DISPLAY-SUMMARY-01.description: Model summary display format with structured layout

EXPR-CONSTR-01.description: Expression construction from programmatic API and ESM JSON parsing

EXPR-SUBST-01.description: Recursive substitution with hierarchical scoped references

EXPR-FREE-01.description: free_variables() must return all variable references in expression

EXPR-EVAL-01.description: evaluate() must require all variables in bindings or raise error

EXPR-SIMP-01.description: simplify() must at minimum fold constant arithmetic

SERIAL-JSON-01.description: Serialization must produce output that validates against schema

VERSION-COMPAT-01.description: Libraries must reject files with unsupported major version

VERSION-COMPAT-02.description: Libraries must accept files with minor version <= supported version

tests/valid/minimal_chemistry.esm.description: Minimal valid ESM file based on esm-spec.md Section 13 example

tests/valid/full_coupled.esm.description: Comprehensive file exercising all sections and coupling types

tests/valid/events_all_types.esm.description: File exercising all event variants: continuous, discrete, functional affects

tests/invalid/missing_esm_version.esm.description: Schema error: missing required esm version field

tests/invalid/equation_count_mismatch.es.description: Structural error: number of ODEs != number of state variables

tests/display/chemical_subscripts.json.description: Chemical species name rendering with element-aware subscripts
tests/display/chemical_subscripts.json.test_data_format: Array of {input: string, unicode: string, latex: string}

tests/display/expr_precedence.json.test_data_format: Array of {input: Expression, unicode: string, latex: string}

tests/substitution/simple_var_replace.js.test_data_format: Array of {input: Expression, bindings: object, expected: Expression}

tests/reactions/ode_generation.json.description: Mass action ODE generation from reaction stoichiometry

tests/invalid/missing_metadata.esm.description: Schema error: missing required metadata field

tests/valid/model_only.esm.description: Valid file with only models section (no reaction_systems)

tests/valid/reaction_system_only.esm.description: Valid file with only reaction_systems section (no models)

tests/invalid/no_systems.esm.description: Invalid file missing both models and reaction_systems

tests/expressions/valid_ast.json.description: Valid expression AST examples following grammar

tests/expressions/invalid_ast.json.description: Invalid expression AST that violates grammar

tests/invalid/undefined_species.esm.description: Reaction references species not declared in species section

tests/invalid/unresolved_scoped_ref.esm.description: Scoped reference cannot be resolved using dot notation

tests/invalid/event_var_undeclared.esm.description: Event affects reference variables not declared in system

tests/invalid/invalid_discrete_param.esm.description: discrete_parameters entry does not match declared parameter

tests/invalid/negative_stoichiometry.esm.description: Reaction with negative or zero stoichiometry values

tests/invalid/null_reaction.esm.description: Reaction with both substrates: null and products: null

tests/invalid/undefined_system.esm.description: Coupling entry references nonexistent model/reaction system/data loader/operator

tests/valid/structural_issues.esm.description: Valid JSON/schema but with structural validation issues

tests/valid/full_model_specification.esm.description: Model with complete specification of equations, variables, parameters

tests/reactions/mass_action_odes.json.description: Standard mass action kinetics ODE generation examples

tests/expressions/arithmetic_operators.j.description: Built-in arithmetic operators with specified arities

tests/expressions/calculus_operators.jso.description: Calculus operators with required additional fields

tests/events/continuous_events.esm.description: Continuous events with conditions and affects arrays

tests/events/discrete_events.esm.description: Discrete events with trigger and affects fields

tests/models/variable_types.esm.description: Model variables with valid type field values

tests/reactions/reaction_fields.esm.description: Reactions with required id, substrates, products, rate fields

tests/coupling/operator_compose.json.description: operator_compose algorithm for equation matching and combining

tests/coupling/placeholder_expansion.jso.description: Placeholder expansion where _var matches every state variable

tests/validation/schema_errors.json.description: SchemaError structure with path, message, keyword fields

tests/validation/structural_errors.json.description: StructuralError with path, code, message, details fields

tests/validation/error_codes.json.description: Structural error codes matching specification standards

tests/display/element_recognition.json.description: Element lookup recognizing all 118 chemical element symbols

tests/display/number_formatting.json.description: Number formatting for integers, decimals, scientific notation

tests/display/model_summary.json.description: Model summary display with structured layout

tests/expressions/construction.json.description: Expression construction from API and JSON parsing

tests/substitution/scoped_reference.json.description: Recursive substitution with hierarchical scoped references

tests/expressions/evaluation.json.description: evaluate() requiring all variables in bindings or raising error

tests/expressions/simplification.json.description: simplify() folding constant arithmetic at minimum

tests/version/unsupported_major.esm.description: File with unsupported major version should be rejected

tests/version/backward_compatible.esm.description: File with minor version <= supported version should be accepted

Phase 1 - Foundation.description: Core parsing, validation, and expression handling

Phase 2 - Analysis.description: Advanced validation, algorithms, and display formats

Phase 3 - Advanced.description: Version compatibility and full feature completeness

validation_notes.automated_tooling: This matrix enables automated verification of requirement coverage by checking that each requirement ID maps to at least one test fixture
validation_notes.ci_integration: Test fixtures should be executed in CI to prevent regressions and ensure consistent behavior across language implementations
validation_notes.cross_language: The same test fixtures must produce identical results across Julia, TypeScript, Python, Rust, and Go implementations
validation_notes.maintenance: When specifications are updated, this matrix must be updated to reflect new or modified requirements
